SEO/GEO Automation — Quick Start
==================================

PREREQUISITES:
1. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be set in GitHub repo secrets
   (Settings > Secrets and variables > Actions > New repository secret)

2. Claude Code GitHub App must be installed
   (Run /install-github-app in Claude Code terminal)

HOW IT RUNS:
- Automatically: Every day at 12:00 UTC (Mode 1: Daily Quick Audit)
- Manually: Go to Actions > SEO/GEO Automation > Run workflow
  - Choose "daily" for quick audit or "weekly" for deep optimization

WHAT IT DOES:
- Checks sitemap, meta tags, JSON-LD, robots.txt, llms.txt
- Validates heading hierarchy and content structure
- In weekly mode: competitor analysis, SERP checks, GEO readiness
- Creates a PR with fixes if issues are found
- Updates memory.md and gotchas.md with findings

KEY FILES:
- .github/seo-geo-automation/claude.md   — Full instructions for the agent
- .github/seo-geo-automation/memory.md   — Learnings tracker
- .github/seo-geo-automation/gotchas.md  — Mistakes to avoid
- .github/workflows/seo-geo-audit.yml    — GitHub Actions workflow
- SEO_CHANGELOG.md                       — Change log in repo root

TROUBLESHOOTING:
- If workflow fails: Check that ANTHROPIC_API_KEY secret is set
- If no PR created: The audit found no issues (check Actions logs)
- To force a run: Actions > SEO/GEO Automation > Run workflow
